use_cases: Form submission triggers and action buttons in web applications
Navigation links and route changes within applications
Modal dialog openers and confirmation actions
Interactive card elements requiring clickable areas
Toolbar and control panel action elements
ai_summary: A reusable atomic button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition support and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Features standard accessibility attributes including focus rings and disabled states, making it suitable as a foundational UI element across any React application.
